name: Brainrot Clicker Game 3D
description: Step into the most absurd HTML5 clicker game ever created. Meet a completely unhinged cast of meme-fueled Italian brainrot creatures: sharks wearing sneakers, flying chocolate blocks, belly-bird abominations, and other chaotic nonsense waiting to be tapped. Your mission? Tap as fast as possible to earn points, trigger ridiculous animations, and unleash pure cartoon madness.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
